<file>
00001| import { useState, useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
00002| import {
00003|   type Abi,
00004|   type Address,
00005|   type Hash,
00006|   type ContractFunctionName,
00007|   type ContractFunctionArgs,
00008|   encodeFunctionData,
00009|   createPublicClient,
00010|   http,
00011| } from 'viem'
00012| import { useSendTransaction, useWaitForTransactionReceipt, useSwitchChain, useChainId } from 'wagmi'
00013| import { toast } from 'sonner'
00014| import { useWallet } from './useWallet'
00015| import { BlockchainError, ChainSwitchError } from '../lib/blockchain/types'
00016| import { getChainById, getRpcUrl } from '../lib/blockchain/chains'
00017| 
00018| const GAS_BUFFER_MULTIPLIER = 130n
00019| const GAS_RETRY_MULTIPLIER = 150n
00020| const GAS_DIVISOR = 100n
00021| 
00022| /**
00023|  * Parameters for writing to a contract
00024|  */
00025| export interface WriteContractParams<
00026|   TAbi extends Abi = Abi,
00027|   TName extends ContractFunctionName<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'> = ContractFunctionName<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'>
00028| > {
00029|   /** Contract address to interact with */
00030|   contractAddress: Address
00031|   /** Chain ID for the transaction */
00032|   chainId: number
00033|   /** Contract ABI */
00034|   abi: TAbi
00035|   /** Function name to call */
00036|   functionName: TName
00037|   /** Function arguments */
00038|   args: ContractFunctionArgs<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable', TName>
00039|   /** ETH value to send (in wei) */
00040|   value?: bigint
00041| }
00042| 
00043| /**
00044|  * Transaction lifecycle status
00045|  */
00046| export type WriteStatus =
00047|   | 'idle'
00048|   | 'preparing'
00049|   | 'ready'
00050|   | 'switching-chain'
00051|   | 'pending'
00052|   | 'confirming'
00053|   | 'success'
00054|   | 'error'
00055| 
00056| /**
00057|  * Current state of the write transaction lifecycle
00058|  */
00059| export interface WriteLifecycleState {
00060|   /** Current status of the transaction */
00061|   status: WriteStatus
00062|   /** Whether any operation is in progress */
00063|   isLoading: boolean
00064|   /** Transaction hash once submitted */
00065|   txHash: Hash | null
00066|   /** Error if transaction failed */
00067|   error: Error | null
00068| }
00069| 
00070| /**
00071|  * Prepared transaction data
00072|  */
00073| export interface PreparedWrite {
00074|   /** Target contract address */
00075|   to: Address
00076|   /** Encoded function call data */
00077|   data: `0x${string}`
00078|   /** ETH value to send */
00079|   value?: bigint
00080|   /** Contract ABI (for reference) */
00081|   abi: Abi
00082|   /** Function name (for reference) */
00083|   functionName: string
00084|   /** Function arguments (for reference) */
00085|   args: readonly unknown[]
00086| }
00087| 
00088| /**
00089|  * Options for the write contract lifecycle hook
00090|  */
00091| export interface WriteContractOptions {
00092|   /** Callback when transaction succeeds */
00093|   onSuccess?: (txHash: Hash) => void
00094|   /** Callback when transaction fails */
00095|   onError?: (error: Error) => void
00096|   /** Custom success message for toast */
00097|   successMessage?: string
00098|   /** Custom error message for toast */
00099|   errorMessage?: string
00100| }
00101| 
00102| export interface UseWriteContractLifecycleReturn<
00103|   TAbi extends Abi = Abi,
00104|   TName extends ContractFunctionName<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'> = ContractFunctionName<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'>
00105| > {
00106|   /** Transaction state */
00107|   state: WriteLifecycleState
00108|   /** Execute write */
00109|   write: <T extends TAbi, N extends ContractFunctionName<T, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'>>(
00110|     params: WriteContractParams<T, N>
00111|   ) => Promise<void>
00112|   /** Reset state */
00113|   reset: () => void
00114|   /** Loading */
00115|   isLoading: boolean
00116|   /** Error */
00117|   error: Error | null
00118|   /** TX hash */
00119|   txHash: Hash | null
00120|   /** Status */
00121|   status: WriteStatus
00122|   /** Write params */
00123|   writeData: WriteContractParams<TAbi, TName> | null
00124| }
00125| 
00126| /**
00127|  * Manage contract write transaction lifecycle
00128|  * 
00129|  * @example
00130|  * ```typescript
00131|  * const { write, state } = useWriteContractLifecycle({
00132|  *   onSuccess: (txHash) => console.log('Success!', txHash),
00133|  *   successMessage: 'Transfer completed!'
00134|  * })
00135|  * 
00136|  * await write({
00137|  *   contractAddress: tokenAddress,
00138|  *   chainId: 8453,
00139|  *   abi: ERC20_ABI,
00140|  *   functionName: 'transfer',
00141|  *   args: [recipient, amount],
00142|  * })
00143|  * ```
00144|  */
00145| export function useWriteContractLifecycle<
00146|   TAbi extends Abi = Abi,
00147|   TName extends ContractFunctionName<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'> = ContractFunctionName<TAbi, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'>
00148| >(options: WriteContractOptions): UseWriteContractLifecycleReturn<TAbi, TName> {
00149|   const sleep = (ms: number) => new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms))
00150|   const scheduleDismiss = (id: string, ms: number) => { setTimeout(() => toast.dismiss(id), ms) }
00151|   const onSuccess = options.onSuccess
00152|   const onError = options.onError
00153|   const successMessage = options.successMessage || 'Transaction completed successfully!'
00154|   const errorMessage = options.errorMessage || 'Transaction failed. Please try again.'
00155| 
00156|   const { address, isConnected } = useWallet()
00157|   const currentChainId = useChainId()
00158|   const { switchChain } = useSwitchChain()
00159|   
00160|   const [writeData, setWriteData] = useState<WriteContractParams<TAbi, TName> | null>(null)
00161|   const [state, setState] = useState<WriteLifecycleState>({
00162|     status: 'idle',
00163|     isLoading: false,
00164|     txHash: null,
00165|     error: null,
00166|   })
00167| 
00168|   // Use refs to store callbacks to avoid including them in useEffect dependencies
00169|   const onSuccessRef = useRef(onSuccess)
00170|   const onErrorRef = useRef(onError)
00171|   const successMessageRef = useRef(successMessage)
00172|   const errorMessageRef = useRef(errorMessage)
00173| 
00174|   // Update refs when callbacks change
00175|   useEffect(() => {
00176|     onSuccessRef.current = onSuccess
00177|     onErrorRef.current = onError
00178|     successMessageRef.current = successMessage
00179|     errorMessageRef.current = errorMessage
00180|   }, [onSuccess, onError, successMessage, errorMessage])
00181| 
00182|   // Send the transaction
00183|   const {
00184|     sendTransaction,
00185|     data: sendData,
00186|     error: sendError,
00187|     isPending: isSending,
00188|   } = useSendTransaction()
00189| 
00190|   // Wait for transaction confirmation
00191|   const {
00192|     isLoading: isConfirming,
00193|     isSuccess,
00194|     error: confirmError,
00195|   } = useWaitForTransactionReceipt({
00196|     hash: sendData,
00197|   })
00198| 
00199|   /**
00200|    * Prepare write transaction by encoding function data
00201|    */
00202|   const prepareWrite = useCallback(async <T extends Abi, N extends ContractFunctionName<T, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'>>(
00203|     params: WriteContractParams<T, N>
00204|   ): Promise<PreparedWrite> => {
00205|     try {
00206|       setState(prev => ({ ...prev, status: 'preparing', isLoading: true }))
00207| 
00208|       // Check if function is payable
00209|       const fn = params.abi.find(
00210|         (item) => item.type === 'function' && item.name === params.functionName
00211|       )
00212|       
00213|       if (params.value && fn && 'stateMutability' in fn && fn.stateMutability !== 'payable') {
00214|         throw new Error(`Function ${params.functionName} is not payable but value was provided`)
00215|       }
00216| 
00217|       // Encode the function data
00218|       const data = encodeFunctionData({
00219|         abi: params.abi,
00220|         functionName: params.functionName,
00221|         args: params.args,
00222|       } as any)
00223| 
00224|       const preparedWrite: PreparedWrite = {
00225|         to: params.contractAddress,
00226|         data,
00227|         value: params.value,
00228|         abi: params.abi,
00229|         functionName: params.functionName as string,
00230|         args: params.args as readonly unknown[],
00231|       }
00232| 
00233|       setState(prev => ({ 
00234|         ...prev, 
00235|         status: 'ready', 
00236|         isLoading: false,
00237|       }))
00238| 
00239|       return preparedWrite
00240|     } catch (error) {
00241|       const errorObj = error instanceof Error ? error : new Error(String(error))
00242|       
00243|       setState({
00244|         status: 'error',
00245|         error: errorObj,
00246|         txHash: null,
00247|         isLoading: false,
00248|       })
00249|       
00250|       throw errorObj
00251|     }
00252|   }, [])
00253| 
00254|   /**
00255|    * Handle chain switching if needed
00256|    */
00257|   const handleChainSwitch = useCallback(async (targetChainId: number): Promise<void> => {
00258|     if (currentChainId === targetChainId) {
00259|       return
00260|     }
00261| 
00262|     try {
00263|       setState(prev => ({ ...prev, status: 'switching-chain', isLoading: true }))
00264| 
00265|       switchChain({ chainId: targetChainId })
00266|       
00267|       toast.dismiss('chain-switch')
00268|       toast.success('Network switched successfully', { id: 'chain-switch-success' })
00269| 
00270|       // Give a small delay to ensure the chain switch is complete
00271|       await sleep(2000)
00272| 
00273|       // Fallback: ensure toasts are cleared after 5s (non-blocking)
00274|       scheduleDismiss('chain-switch-success', 5000)
00275|       scheduleDismiss('chain-switch', 5000)
00276| 
00277|     } catch (switchError) {
00278|       toast.dismiss('chain-switch')
00279|       toast.dismiss('chain-switch-success')
00280|       const errorMsg = 'Failed to switch network. Please switch manually.'
00281|       const chainError = new ChainSwitchError(currentChainId, targetChainId, switchError)
00282|       
00283|       toast.error(errorMsg)
00284|       setState({
00285|         status: 'error',
00286|         error: chainError,
00287|         txHash: null,
00288|         isLoading: false,
00289|       })
00290|       
00291|       throw chainError
00292|     }
00293|   }, [currentChainId, switchChain])
00294| 
00295|   /**
00296|    * Estimate gas for a prepared write, returning a buffered gas limit
00297|    */
00298|   const estimateGas = useCallback(async (
00299|     preparedWrite: PreparedWrite,
00300|     chainId: number,
00301|     from: Address,
00302|     multiplier: bigint = GAS_BUFFER_MULTIPLIER
00303|   ): Promise<bigint | undefined> => {
00304|     try {
00305|       const chain = getChainById(chainId)
00306|       if (!chain) return undefined
00307|       const publicClient = createPublicClient({ chain, transport: http(getRpcUrl(chainId)) })
00308|       const estimated = await publicClient.estimateGas({
00309|         account: from,
00310|         to: preparedWrite.to,
00311|         data: preparedWrite.data,
00312|         value: preparedWrite.value,
00313|       })
00314|       return (estimated * multiplier) / GAS_DIVISOR
00315|     } catch {
00316|       return undefined
00317|     }
00318|   }, [])
00319| 
00320|   /**
00321|    * Execute the prepared write transaction
00322|    */
00323|   const executePreparedWrite = useCallback(async (
00324|     preparedWrite: PreparedWrite,
00325|     chainId?: number
00326|   ): Promise<void> => {
00327|     try {
00328|       let gasLimit: bigint | undefined
00329|       if (chainId && address) {
00330|         gasLimit = await estimateGas(preparedWrite, chainId, address as Address)
00331|       }
00332| 
00333|       try {
00334|         sendTransaction({
00335|           to: preparedWrite.to,
00336|           data: preparedWrite.data,
00337|           value: preparedWrite.value,
00338|           gas: gasLimit,
00339|         })
00340|       } catch (firstErr: any) {
00341|         const isGasErr = firstErr?.message?.toLowerCase().includes('gas') ||
00342|           firstErr?.message?.toLowerCase().includes('intrinsic') ||
00343|           firstErr?.message?.toLowerCase().includes('underpriced')
00344| 
00345|         if (isGasErr && chainId && address) {
00346|           console.warn('Gas estimation too low, retrying with higher gas limit:', firstErr.message)
00347|           const retryGas = await estimateGas(preparedWrite, chainId, address as Address, GAS_RETRY_MULTIPLIER)
00348|           sendTransaction({
00349|             to: preparedWrite.to,
00350|             data: preparedWrite.data,
00351|             value: preparedWrite.value,
00352|             gas: retryGas,
00353|           })
00354|         } else {
00355|           throw firstErr
00356|         }
00357|       }
00358|     } catch (error) {
00359|       const errorObj = error instanceof Error ? error : new Error(String(error))
00360|       const blockchainError = new BlockchainError('Transaction execution failed', 'TX_EXECUTION_ERROR', errorObj)
00361|       
00362|       setState({
00363|         status: 'error',
00364|         error: blockchainError,
00365|         txHash: null,
00366|         isLoading: false,
00367|       })
00368|       
00369|       throw blockchainError
00370|     }
00371|   }, [sendTransaction, estimateGas, address])
00372| 
00373|   // Update state based on transaction lifecycle
00374|   useEffect(() => {
00375|     if (sendError || confirmError) {
00376|       const error = sendError || confirmError
00377|       setState({
00378|         status: 'error',
00379|         error: error as Error,
00380|         txHash: sendData || null,
00381|         isLoading: false,
00382|       })
00383|       toast.dismiss('tx-pending')
00384|       toast.error(errorMessageRef.current)
00385|       setTimeout(() => { toast.dismiss('tx-confirming'); toast.dismiss('tx-pending') }, 5000)
00386|       onErrorRef.current?.(error as Error)
00387|     } else if (isSending) {
00388|       setState({
00389|         status: 'pending',
00390|         error: null,
00391|         txHash: null,
00392|         isLoading: true,
00393|       })
00394|       toast.loading('Please confirm the transaction in your wallet...', { id: 'tx-pending' })
00395|       setTimeout(() => toast.dismiss('tx-pending'), 5000)
00396|     } else if (isConfirming) {
00397|       setState({
00398|         status: 'confirming',
00399|         error: null,
00400|         txHash: sendData || null,
00401|         isLoading: true,
00402|       })
00403|       toast.dismiss('tx-pending')
00404|       toast.loading('Transaction submitted. Waiting for confirmation...', { id: 'tx-confirming' })
00405|       setTimeout(() => toast.dismiss('tx-confirming'), 5000)
00406|     } else if (isSuccess) {
00407|       setState({
00408|         status: 'success',
00409|         error: null,
00410|         txHash: sendData || null,
00411|         isLoading: false,
00412|       })
00413|       toast.dismiss('tx-confirming')
00414|       toast.success(successMessageRef.current, { id: 'tx-success' })
00415|       setTimeout(() => toast.dismiss('tx-success'), 5000)
00416|       onSuccessRef.current?.(sendData!)
00417|     }
00418|   }, [sendError, confirmError, isSending, isConfirming, isSuccess, sendData])
00419| 
00420|   /**
00421|    * Execute a write contract transaction with automatic preparation and chain switching
00422|    */
00423|   const write = useCallback(async <T extends TAbi, N extends ContractFunctionName<T, 'nonpayable' | 'payable'>>(
00424|     params: WriteContractParams<T, N>
00425|   ): Promise<void> => {
00426|     if (!isConnected || !address) {
00427|       const error = new BlockchainError('Wallet not connected', 'WALLET_NOT_CONNECTED')
00428|       setState({
00429|         status: 'error',
00430|         error,
00431|         txHash: null,
00432|         isLoading: false,
00433|       })
00434|       toast.error('Please connect your wallet first', { duration: 5000 })
00435|       throw error
00436|     }
00437| 
00438|     try {
00439|       setWriteData(params as any)
00440|       
00441|       // Handle chain switching if needed
00442|       await handleChainSwitch(params.chainId)
00443|       
00444|       // Prepare the write transaction
00445|       const preparedWrite = await prepareWrite(params)
00446|       
00447|       // Execute the transaction with gas estimation
00448|       await executePreparedWrite(preparedWrite, params.chainId)
00449|     } catch (error) {
00450|       // Errors are already handled in the individual functions
00451|       console.error('Write contract execution failed:', error)
00452|     }
00453|   }, [isConnected, address, handleChainSwitch, prepareWrite, executePreparedWrite])
00454| 
00455|   /**
00456|    * Reset the write state
00457|    */
00458|   const reset = useCallback(() => {
00459|     setState({
00460|       status: 'idle',
00461|       error: null,
00462|       txHash: null,
00463|       isLoading: false,
00464|     })
00465|     setWriteData(null)
00466|   }, [])
00467| 
00468|   return {
00469|     state,
00470|     write,
00471|     reset,
00472|     isLoading: state.isLoading,
00473|     error: state.error,
00474|     txHash: state.txHash,
00475|     status: state.status,
00476|     writeData,
00477|   }
00478| }
</file>

metadata.preview:
import { useState, useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import {
  type Abi,
  type Address,
  type Hash,
  type ContractFunctionName,
  type ContractFunctionArgs,
  encodeFunctionData,
  createPublicClient,
  http,
} from 'viem'
import { useSendTransaction, useWaitForTransactionReceipt, useSwitchChain, useChainId } from 'wagmi'
import { toast } from 'sonner'
import { useWallet } from './useWallet'
import { BlockchainError, ChainSwitchError } from '../lib/blockchain/types'
import { getChainById, getRpcUrl } from '../lib/blockchain/chains'

const GAS_BUFFER_MULTIPLIER = 130n
const GAS_RETRY_MULTIPLIER = 150n
const GAS_DIVISOR = 100n

state.title: frontend/src/hooks/useWriteContractLifecycle.ts
